question.label: Opening pace check
question.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
question.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

answer: I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.

assessment.note: Pivoted from energy to stalled mentoring; stopping pushing signals mild disengagement, and also reveals a concrete mentoring thread worth probing plus a growth signal off-signature.

new_queue.label: Stopped pushing
new_queue.name: You said you stopped pushing — what made you back off?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Next-quarter shape
new_queue.name: What do you expect to own next quarter?

new_queue.label: Unblocked next step
new_queue.name: What support from me would make your next ownership easier?

new_queue.label: Close-out focus
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?

issues: coverage: injected clarity into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
